title: Hassett Green London - Harmony - Scented Wooden Balls Pack of 100 - Alternative to Pot Pourri, Diffusers, Sachets and Drawer Liners
features: Hassett Green Scented Wooden Balls are an innovative and established way of adding fragrance to your room, cupboards, drawers and even your car. Pack of 100 Balls provides an ample supply for enhancing every corner of your living space
A beautifully balanced fragrance of apple, lemon, peach and grapefruit, matched together with rose, lily, violet and jasmine on a base of sandalwood, amber and softest musk
Made from European softwood sourced from responsibly managed forests, these scented balls can be refreshed repeatedly with Hassett Green Home Fragrance Oil for long-lasting enjoyment

The perfect gift idea to give or receive, ideal for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, new homes & more. Classic Collection from Hassett Green provides iconic and effective fragrances that everyone will love
Vegan friendly, contains natural extracts & essential oils. Proudly made in the UK
description: Product description Hassett Green Scented Wooden Balls, each 1 inch in diameter and packaged in a convenient pack of 100, are crafted from high-quality European softwood responsibly sourced from sustainably managed forests. These innovative and effective scented balls effortlessly add a delightful fragrance to your room, cupboards, drawers, and even your car. They serve as a perfect alternative to traditional potpourri, diffusers, sachets, and drawer liners, offering a long-lasting and eco-friendly solution for freshening up your spaces. Enjoy the iconic fragrances from Hassett Green's Classic Collection and elevate your everyday environment with ease. Safety Warning Choking hazard - Keep out of reach of children and pets. May cause allergic reactions in some individuals. Dispose of responsibly.
